field_values.action_summary: The protagonist decides to test the limits of his guard by attempting to leave the room, observing how the Watch Dog reacts to his movement.
field_values.camera_intent: Tracking shots following the protagonist; POV shots of the_watch_dog watching him; Handheld/unsteady shots for tension
field_values.end_state: scene resolves into the next narrative beat
movement_notes: Physical distance between protagonist and the_watch_dog
Lighting transition from captive_chamber_murals to deserted_martian_cityscape
field_values.transition_notes:
# Scene Contract: CH005_SC003

## Production Intent
The protagonist tests the physical and psychological boundaries of his confinement by moving toward an exit, monitoring the reaction of the watch dog to gauge escape feasibility.

## Required Cast
- protagonist (experienced Earthman fighter, physically fit)
- the_watch_dog

## Required Environments
- captive_chamber_murals (decorated with Martian landscape murals)
- deserted_martian_cityscape (exterior street)

## Continuity Constraints
- Maintain specific distance between protagonist and the_watch_dog during movement.
- Execute lighting transition from diffuse indoor chamber to hard outdoor cityscape light at threshold.

## Beat List
- BT001: protagonist paces restlessly
- BT002: testing the guard's reaction
- BT003: crossing the threshold
field_values.dialogue_relevance: dialogue supports scene intent and continuity
